title: Compact Classic Computer Badge
prompt: Create a retro computer-science logo mark inspired by early Macintosh-era personal computers and classic CS lab aesthetics. Use the provided source idea only as identity guidance: a simple black circular dot with a soft shadow. Preserve the idea of one central black circular dot as the screen/core. Build a compact classic-computer badge around it using warm off-white plastic, soft grey outlines, small pixel-grid details, and a subtle screen glow. No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, no fake brand marks, no code snippets. Clean white background, centered composition, polished logo mark, playful but not childish, minimal enough to become a portfolio hero logo.

title: Rounded Beige Terminal Icon
prompt: Create a fun retro computer-science logo mark in an Old Mac badge style. Use the provided source idea only as identity guidance: a black circular dot with soft shadow. Make the black dot the central terminal screen/core inside a rounded warm beige computer icon. Add restrained pixel-grid accents, tiny abstract circuit-trace details, soft grey outlines, and gentle phosphor-like glow. No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, no fake brand marks, no UI labels, no code snippets. Clean white background, centered composition, charming classic-computing feel, polished enough for a portfolio hero mark.

title: Playful Retro Desktop Emblem
prompt: Create a playful retro desktop-computer emblem for a computer-science portfolio logo. Use the supplied black-dot identity as loose guidance: keep one black circular dot as the dominant center anchor. Surround it with early Macintosh-inspired off-white plastic geometry, soft grey bezels, subtle circuit-trace accents, small pixel-grid ornament, and a neat badge silhouette. No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no fake brand marks, no watermarks, no code snippets, no charts. White background, centered, medium-detail hero logo, fun and nice while still clean and professional.
